creator: kwiat3k@panic.pl
text:
It looks different when executing script directly:
`/usr/local/etc/rc.d/containerd start`
Using it this way "leaks" users' environment into the process:
```
envp[5]: PATH=/sbin:/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/root/bin
```

I'm testing this script with `service(8)` which sanitises ENV (not /etc/rc):
```
# grep PATH /usr/sbin/service
		exec env -i -L -/daemon HOME=/ PATH=/sbin:/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin "$dir/$script" "$@"
```
